hero.title: LeoEd AI: Personalizing
hero.subtitle: An Adaptive Learning System (ALS) that bridges the gap between standardized teaching and individualized mastery.

philosophy.label: CORE PHILOSOPHY
philosophy.title: Learn, Evolve, Optimize
philosophy.description: LEO captures the full learning cycle that the system is designed to support.
philosophy.learnDesc: Students learn new concepts through a personalized sequence of activities.
philosophy.evolveDesc: The platform continually updates its database and learner model based on the student’s performance and progress.
philosophy.optimizeDesc: The system finetunes its recommendations to close the learning gaps and strengthen mastery.

features.label: CORE CAPABILITIES
features.title: Powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash for Advanced Learning
features.adaptiveQuiz: Adaptive Quiz Generation (Powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash)
features.adaptiveQuizDesc: Tailored questions that evolve with progress, ensuring optimal challenge and mastery.
features.aiGradingDesc: Detailed, step-by-step feedback on student responses within seconds.
features.multiModalDesc: Seamlessly process handwritten images and multi-lingual text for a richer learning experience.
features.feedbackLoopDesc: A continuous cycle of assessment and correction that drives rapid improvement.

solutions.label: ROADMAP
solutions.title: Phased Implementation and Market Expansion
solutions.description: LeoEd AI is designed to support high-quality education across various disciplines.

accounting.subject: HKMU University Course
accounting.subtitle: Proof-of-Concept Pilot
accounting.desc: Initial validation of rule-based precision grading and student mastery tracking.

math.subject: HKDSE Mathematics
math.subtitle: Secondary Education Market
math.desc: Scaling to support the massive HKDSE exam preparation market.

future.subject: Mainland China Market
future.subtitle: Future Strategic Growth
future.desc: Expanding to support the Gaokao exam market with over 13 million candidates.

partners.label: TRUSTED BY LEADERS
partners.title: Our Partner Schools
partners.description: Highly trusted and recognized by the education community.

pricing.label: PRICING REVOLUTION
pricing.title: Transparent, Flexible Pricing Plans
pricing.updating: Pricing plans being adjusted, stay tuned

educators.label: FOR EDUCATORS & INSTITUTIONS
educators.title: Empowering Teachers, Building Smart Schools
educators.description: Transform teaching from standardized instruction to a highly responsive, student-centered system.
educators.insightsDesc: Track student performance at the micro level and clearly understand learning gaps across the class.
educators.timeSavingDesc: Reduce the burden of heavy manual grading. Our AI can reliably assess open-ended questions and chart answers, allowing educators to focus on high-impact teaching and personalized support.
educators.dataDrivenDesc: Use actionable analytics data to provide targeted remediation or alternative explanations when students need them most.

team.title: Core R&D Team
team.description: From Hong Kong Metropolitan University, specializing in speech and natural language processing technology.

footer.tagline:
Smarter marking for teachers.
Deeper learning for students.
AI-powered teaching, making education a joy.
